div.p:
For an account of a visit in early 1954 of United States Representative to the United Nations Trusteeship Council Mason Sears to West
Africa including the Belgian Congo, French Equatorial Africa, French and British Cameroons, Nigeria, French and British Togoland, and the Gold Coast, see Sears’ memorandum of June 3, 1954 to Assistant Secretary of State for United Nations Affairs David Key, volume III, page 1383.
